issues.title: Exit code mismatch: 1 vs expected 0
issues.detail: Playwright exited with code 1 despite all 40 tests passing (unexpected=0, expected=40 in JSON stats). This may indicate a non-test process error (e.g., cleanup, report generation) or a playwright runner configuration issue. The actual test results are conclusive and passing.

observations: Exit code 0 and exactly one row returned from locks table
lock_id is present and non-null (0xf45259bda8158c0b424e8ac6b78b8dd384006820866df7e4043c5ae94b7faa3b)
status='pending' is valid (within {pending, locked, confirmed})
pk_dilithium length is exactly 1952 bytes (correct Dilithium public key size)
l1_submitted=f (false) indicates L1 transaction hash is NULL

issues.title: L1 submission not yet recorded
issues.detail: l1_submitted is false (l1_tx_hash IS NULL), meaning the lock has not been submitted to L1 Vault yet. Expected condition requires l1_submitted=t when L1 Vault is reachable. This indicates either: (1) L1 Vault is unreachable/unavailable, or (2) the L1 submission workflow has not yet executed for this newly created lock. If L1 Vault is reachable, this is a hard failure in the submission path.

observations: Script executed and exited with code 1 (expected 0)
Database query found a recent lock with ID 0xf45259bda8158c0b424e8ac6b78b8dd384006820866df7e4043c5ae94b7faa3b
The lock row has no l1_tx_hash value (NULL or empty string in database)
L1 anchoring did not occur; transaction was never submitted to Sepolia
Snapshot cast call to L1Vault (0x07012aeF87C6E423c32F2f8eaF81762f63337260) succeeded: totalLocked() = 120000000000000000 wei (0x1.2e17)
No receipt lookup was attempted because the lock lacks an L1 transaction hash

issues.title: L1 Anchoring Not Triggered
issues.detail: The Consumer Lock sequence created a lock record in the database but failed to anchor it on L1 Sepolia. The l1_tx_hash field is empty, indicating the transaction was never submitted. Root cause is likely missing QS__L1_PRIVATE_KEY environment variable or L1 submission logic failure.

issues.title: Missing L1 Transaction
issues.detail: Expected the most recent lock (0xf45259bda8158c0b424e8ac6b78b8dd384006820866df7e4043c5ae94b7faa3b) to have a corresponding Sepolia transaction hash, but the database field is empty. Cannot verify receipt status without a hash.
